modules.name: MK_audio
modules.purpose: Device-independent audio foundations. Currently provides an AudioMixer that validates audio buses, voices, spatial listener/source descriptors, clip metadata, device render requests, resampling quality, and interleaved float clip sample data; tracks logical clip asset ids; produces deterministic mix commands; builds spatial voice/listener metadata for distance attenuation and stereo pan; plans sample-frame voice scheduling; records streaming buffer availability, device format conversion intent, and underrun diagnostics; exposes AudioGameplayMixRequest, AudioGameplayMixPlan, and plan_gameplay_audio_mix so generated games can fail closed while converting game-owned cue, bus, fade, pause, loop, trigger, and optional spatial metadata rows into mixer-ready bus and voice commands; provides AudioStreamingQueue for decoded chunk append/consume/starvation state without codecs; renders deterministic interleaved float PCM buffers with gain, selectable nearest/linear resampling, channel conversion, and clamping; exposes AudioDeviceStreamRequest, AudioDeviceStreamPlan, plan_audio_device_stream, and render_audio_device_stream_interleaved_float so host adapters can fill output queues from AudioMixer PCM using bounded render chunks; adds AudioProductionReviewRequest, AudioProductionReadinessPlan, AudioProductionDecodedSourceEvidenceRow, AudioProductionStreamingChunkEvidenceRow, AudioProductionFormatConversionPolicyRow, AudioProductionDspGraphRow, AudioProductionDeviceLifecycleRow, AudioProductionUnsupportedClaimRow, and review_audio_production_readiness for side-effect-free reviewed decoded source, streaming chunk, conversion, bus/voice budget, DSP graph, spatial/listener, HRTF host gate, device lifecycle, unsupported claim, diagnostics, selected-package readiness, production-readiness, and replay-hash evidence; rejects broad codec support, audio middleware parity, native device handle exposure, background streaming execution, HRTF execution, device callback/IO, subjective mix-quality, incomplete rows, and budget overflow; and does not open OS audio devices.

modules.name: MK_audio_wasapi

It does not claim exclusive mode, capture, device-selection UI, spatial audio, hotplug parity, or broad latency readiness.
